column1: Complications to trial and issues arising in free text
For many of the pre-specified outcomes, time points are given, e.g. Overall survival [ Time Frame: Every clinic visit (every 2-4 weeks) up to 42 months ].

However, these outcomes are often reported as one number, mean or median. This is either not reporting pre-specified time points, or the 'time points' specified are a description of the measurements they take to get their overall value for the outcome
The above outcomes have been assessed as if the latter is true, although I have included non-pre-specified outcomes highlighted in yellow in case of the former
